metadata.title: Casa DaVan | Bistro & Boutique
metadata.description: We are mystical souls. Bistro and boutique on the Oaxacan coast of Mexico.

common.notFoundDescription: Sorry, the page you're looking for doesn't exist.

hero.subtitle: Bistro & Boutique on the Oaxacan coast

brandStory.title: Where the soul meets
brandStory.description: Casa DaVan is born from the connection between earth and spirit. A space where conscious gastronomy meets ethical fashion, in the heart of the Oaxacan coast.

businesses.bistroDescription: Poke bowls, smoothies, specialty coffee, artisan pizzas and more. The only Starlink WiFi in Mazunte.
businesses.boutiqueDescription: Ethical clothing made in India with natural dyes. Designs inspired by nature and spirituality.

newsletter.title: Join our community
newsletter.description: Get updates on events, new dishes and exclusive collections.
newsletter.error: There was an error. Please try again.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.description: We believe in living in harmony with nature, celebrating the beauty of artisanal and conscious living.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To create experiences that nourish the body, soul and community, honoring local traditions and promoting sustainable practices.

locations.title: Locations
locations.subtitle: Find us at three unique destinations

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a question? Write to us.

form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.

menu.title: Menu
menu.subtitle: Conscious gastronomy with fresh, local ingredients

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.subtitle: The best place to work in Mazunte

features.wifiDescription: The only high-speed Starlink internet in Mazunte. Perfect for video calls and remote work.
features.hoursDescription: Open from 8:30 AM to 10:30 PM. Work early or stay late.
features.foodDescription: Specialty coffee, smoothies, poke bowls and more to keep you energized.
features.atmosphereDescription: Bohemian, peaceful space surrounded by nature, perfect for creativity.

cart.title: Cart
cart.emptyDescription: Discover our collection and find pieces that speak to your soul.

success.title: Payment successful!
success.description: Your order has been confirmed. You'll receive an email with the details.

ourCraft.title: Our Craft
ourCraft.subtitle: Ethical fashion made with love
ourCraft.story: Each DaVan Mystique garment is artisanally crafted in India, using natural dyes and sustainable processes that honor both the artisans and the environment.
